name: Gold'n Futures Mineral Corp.
summary: Gold'n Futures Mineral Corp., an exploration stage company, focuses on acquiring and advancing precious metal properties in Canada. Its projects include the Hercules gold project that covers 8740 hectare located to the northeast of Thunder Bay, Ontario; Brady gold project, which covers 100 hectare located in south central Newfoundland; and Cree Lake gold project covering 3616 hectares located in Ontario. The company was formerly known as European Metals Corp. and changed its name to Gold'n Futures Mineral Corp. in July 2020. Gold'n Futures Mineral Corp. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
